# SCDynamicStoreCopySpecific | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ System Configuration ](/documentation/systemconfiguration)

- [ SCDynamicStoreCopySpecific ](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scdynamicstorecopyspecific)

-  SCDynamicStoreCopySpecific 

API Collection# SCDynamicStoreCopySpecific

## [Overview](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scdynamicstorecopyspecific#Overview)

The functions of the `SCDynamicStoreCopySpecific` programming interface allow an application to determine specific configuration information about the current system (for example, the computer or sharing name or the currently logged-in user). Note that these functions follow Core Foundation function-name conventions. A function that has “Create” or “Copy” in its name returns a reference you must release with the [`CFRelease`](/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFRelease) function.

## [Topics](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scdynamicstorecopyspecific#topics)

### [Group](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scdynamicstorecopyspecific#Group)

[`func SCDynamicStoreCopyComputerName(SCDynamicStore?, UnsafeMutablePointer<CFStringEncoding>?) -> CFString?`](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scdynamicstorecopycomputername(_:_:))Returns the current computer name.[`func SCDynamicStoreCopyConsoleUser(SCDynamicStore?, UnsafeMutablePointer<uid_t>?, UnsafeMutablePointer<gid_t>?) -> CFString?`](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scdynamicstorecopyconsoleuser(_:_:_:))Returns information about the user currently logged into the system.[`func SCDynamicStoreCopyLocalHostName(SCDynamicStore?) -> CFString?`](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scdynamicstorecopylocalhostname(_:))Returns the current local host name.[`func SCDynamicStoreCopyLocation(SCDynamicStore?) -> CFString?`](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scdynamicstorecopylocation(_:))Returns the current location identifier.[`func SCDynamicStoreCopyProxies(SCDynamicStore?) -> CFDictionary?`](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scdynamicstorecopyproxies(_:))Returns the key-value pairs that represent the current internet proxy settings.## [See Also](/documentation/systemconfiguration/scdynamicstorecopyspecific#see-also)
